github_project_matches.name: paperpilot
github_project_matches.readme_excerpt: PaperPilot PaperPilot is a SaaS platform that turns research papers into structured analysis plus an executable sandbox. Users authenticate with Firebase, upload a PDF, trigger a multi-agent Vertex AI pipeline, review summaries and insights, ask follow-up questions, and run editable starter code in a Python sandbox.
